title: Premium Wet Floral Foam Bricks (Box of 20) Foam Blocks for Fresh Flower Arrangements, Wedding, Funeral & Craft Displays
features: Trade-Quality Foam Bricks – Premium Floralcraft wet foam, ideal for florists, event planners & DIY crafters. Designed for fresh flower arrangements, bouquets, tributes & seasonal displays
Superior Water Absorption – Quickly soaks & holds water, keeping stems hydrated for days. Balanced pH levels support flower health & reduce wilting.
Easy to Use & Cut – Bricks measure 23 × 11 × 8cm, easily cut to size or shape to fit any vase, bowl or container. Versatile for wedding centrepieces, funeral tributes & school projects.
Dense, Secure Hold – Firm block structure grips stems tightly, preventing movement. Perfect for tall arrangements or heavy blooms like roses, lilies & carnations.
Great Value Trade Pack – Box of 20 bulk floral foam bricks, packed in protective carton. Trusted by UK florists for consistent quality, reliability & long-lasting arrangements.
description: Floralcraft Premium Wet Floral Foam Bricks – Trade-Friendly Pack of 20 Designed for florists, event decorators & hobby crafters, these high-quality wet foam bricks provide the perfect base for fresh flower arrangements. Each brick absorbs and retains water, ensuring flowers stay hydrated and secure for longer-lasting displays. Perfect for: wedding centrepieces, funeral tributes, Christmas wreaths, school crafts & seasonal displays. Size: 23cm (L) × 11cm (W) × 8cm (H) – easily cut to any shape or container. Reliable Quality: Every batch tested against 7 quality standards for consistent florist-grade results. Supplied in Floralcraft bulk packs of 20 bricks for unbeatable trade value.
